H-OS-L1.name: Pebble
H-OS-L1.sphere: Pebble (n=95) achieves strong confidence with mean 7.15 (std 1.78). Qualitative shows 66% noticeable improvement with 'loved it' music reception (19/29). YouTube reach highest at 30 views but retention unknown. AutoGluon predicted 6.86 slightly under-estimated observed.
H-OS-L1.sphere_plain: Pebble was well-liked and helped reduce overstimulation.

H-OS-L2.name: Rainfall
H-OS-L2.sphere: Rainfall (n=51) stays strong confidence with mean 6.92 (std 1.73). Notable bimodal settle: 10/21 at 10-minutes and 3/21 immediate. 65% positive respondents. YouTube severely under-indexed (5 views). AutoGluon 6.86 prediction aligns with observed 6.92.
H-OS-L2.sphere_plain: Rainfall provided noticeable calm for overstimulated listeners.

H-OS-L3.name: Glacier
H-OS-L3.sphere: Glacier (n=47) maintains strong performance with mean 7.04 (std 1.68). Per embedding analysis, this protocol is analytically isolated (mean_sim 0.677). Rhythm perception balanced (10 balanced, 10 calming). AutoGluon 6.86 prediction slightly below observed.
H-OS-L3.sphere_plain: Glacier offered a balanced, calming experience.

H-AX-L1.name: Meadow
H-AX-L1.sphere: Meadow (n=67) achieved strong confidence status with mean 7.22 (std 1.93) and 63% positive. Qualitative data confirms balanced rhythm and moderate improvement (10/23). YouTube shows undiscovered potential (7 views). AutoGluon predicts 7.84 for anxiety zone, aligning with observed mean. No cross-volume variance detected.
H-AX-L1.sphere_plain: Listeners generally felt better after Meadow, noticing a clear calming effect.

H-AX-L2.name: Cottage
H-AX-L2.sphere: Cottage (n=48) shows meaningful confidence with mean 6.94 (std 1.62). Qualitative notes highlight fast entrainment at 5-minutes settle mode (9/20), though music opinions are mixed (9 liked, 5 neutral). YouTube exposure minimal (6 views). Cross-volume comparison suggests consistent response pattern.
H-AX-L2.sphere_plain: Cottage gave a mild mood lift with a soothing rhythm.

H-AX-L3.name: Valley
H-AX-L3.sphere: Valley (n=36) achieves meaningful confidence with mean 7.08 (std 1.89). Qualitative data emphasizes 'very settling' rhythm (10/20) across self-listeners and caregivers. YouTube views low (4) suggesting limited reach. Cross-volume shows consistent performance within anxiety protocols.
H-AX-L3.sphere_plain: Valley was experienced as calming and helped people settle.

H-CR-L1.name: Anchor
H-CR-L1.sphere: Anchor (n=43) yields structurally expected low mean 6.35 (std 1.70) for crisis protocol. Notably, 8/24 report significant improvement despite low scores. Music reception positive (11 liked). YouTube views minimal (6). AutoGluon predicts higher crisis score (7.96) indicating optimization potential.
H-CR-L1.sphere_plain: Anchor helped people in acute distress, though improvement was modest.

H-CR-L2.name: Harbor
H-CR-L2.sphere: Harbor (n=33) shows mean 6.52 (std 1.70) with 55% positive. Qualitative feedback highlights very settling rhythm (8/16). Music opinions polarized (8 neutral, 8 loved). YouTube views low (4). AutoGluon crisis prediction exceeds observed by 1.44 points.
H-CR-L2.sphere_plain: Harbor provided a slight boost for those in crisis.

H-CR-L3.name: Horizon
H-CR-L3.sphere: Horizon (n=27) matches Harbor's 6.52 mean with higher std 1.91. Settle time notably fastest (7/19 at <2 minutes) suggesting effective fast-entrainment design. Music mixed (7 liked, 4 disliked). YouTube minimal (5 views). Consistent with crisis protocol design.
H-CR-L3.sphere_plain: Horizon gave quick settling but modest overall relief.

H-SL-L1.name: Lantern
H-SL-L1.sphere: Lantern (n=54) achieves strong confidence with highest sleep mean 7.19. Qualitative data shows immediate settling (5/15) alongside 5-minute mode. Music highly rated (13/15 loved). YouTube data absent. AutoGluon sleep prediction 7.54 matches observed.
H-SL-L1.sphere_plain: Lantern helped listeners relax and fall asleep more easily.

H-SL-L2.name: Hammock
H-SL-L2.sphere: Hammock (n=45) shows meaningful confidence with mean 7.09. Listener_type skew toward clinical population (6 client/patient). Rhythm opinions mixed (8 balanced, 3 too busy). Suggest minor rhythm adjustment. YouTube data lagged.
H-SL-L2.sphere_plain: Hammock was soothing and supported better rest.

H-SL-L3.name: Midnight
H-SL-L3.sphere: Midnight (n=28) achieves meaningful confidence with mean 7.07. Cross-run drift notable (sim=0.611). Settle pattern: 8 at 5-minutes, 5 at 10-minutes. Music reception split (8 liked, 6 neutral). AutoGluon prediction 7.54 aligns with observed.
H-SL-L3.sphere_plain: Midnight aided sleep with a gentle, balanced rhythm.

T-FC-L1.name: Compass
T-FC-L1.sphere: Compass (n=41) shows meaningful confidence but lowest focus mean 6.46. Rhythm perception skewed 'slightly busy' (9/23). Settle: 7 at 5-minutes, 6 immediate. YouTube minimal (5 views). AutoGluon cross-bucket suggests X-ME-L1 for motivation (7.88).
T-FC-L1.sphere_plain: Compass had mixed results for focus, with some finding the rhythm distracting.

T-FC-L2.name: Waypoint
T-FC-L2.sphere: Waypoint (n=32) lifts mean to 7.19 with std 1.60. Qualitative reports 66% positive with balanced rhythm (8/17). YouTube exposure minimal (4 views). Strong similarity to T-FC-L1 (sim=0.878) suggests protocol redundancy.
T-FC-L2.sphere_plain: Waypoint significantly improved clarity and concentration.

T-FC-L3.name: Summit
T-FC-L3.sphere: Summit (n=35) achieves highest protocol mean 7.63 with strong confidence. Notable concentration at score 10 (10/35). Embedding drift significant (0.532). Playlists: 5 YouTube-sourced responses. AutoGluon prediction 7.73 aligns closely.
T-FC-L3.sphere_plain: Summit was highly effective for deep focus and clarity.

T-CF-L1.name: Ember
T-CF-L1.sphere: Ember (n=34) shows meaningful confidence with mean 6.74. Qualitative reveals fast/slow responder split (6 immediate vs 6 ten-minute settle). Music positive (9 liked, 6 loved). YouTube minimal (2 views). AutoGluon does not specifically predict creative flow zone.
T-CF-L1.sphere_plain: Ember showed gradual improvement for creative flow, liked by most.

T-CF-L2.name: Current
T-CF-L2.sphere: Current (n=24) raises mean to 6.79 with tighter std 1.41. Musical reception strongest in cluster (6 loved, 6 liked). YouTube views minimal (2). Per embedding, analytically similar to T-CF-L1 (sim=0.841). No predicted score available.
T-CF-L2.sphere_plain: Current provided a noticeable boost to creative energy.

T-CF-L3.name: Aurora
T-CF-L3.sphere: Aurora (n=18) achieves developing confidence with highest creative flow mean 7.28. Embedding drift moderate (0.602). Notable: 8/25 using for sleep induction. YouTube exposure growing (7 views). AutoGluon predicts 7.693 for maintenance zone.
T-CF-L3.sphere_plain: Aurora showed strong potential for enhancing creative states.

T-MB-L1.name: Stone
T-MB-L1.sphere: Stone (n=25) shows meaningful confidence with mean 7.04. Settle time longest in THRIVING: 9/23 at 20-minutes. Music mixed (6 liked, 6 neutral). YouTube minimal (3 views). Predicted maintenance score 7.693 suggests optimization potential.
T-MB-L1.sphere_plain: Stone maintained balance with steady, reliable support.

T-MB-L2.name: Axis
T-MB-L2.sphere: Axis (n=22) yields mean 6.68 with elevated std 2.03. Listener mix unique (7 self, 7 client). Rhythm balanced but music mixed. YouTube absent. High variance may reflect population heterogeneity rather than protocol efficacy.
T-MB-L2.sphere_plain: Axis showed moderate balance support with varied listener feedback.

T-MB-L3.name: Orbit
T-MB-L3.sphere: Orbit (n=14) shows developing confidence with mean 6.93. 4/19 report did NOT settle - only significant non-settlement in dataset. Music reception moderate. YouTube minimal (3 views). High drift (0.554) suggests analytical instability.
T-MB-L3.sphere_plain: Orbit helped many maintain balance, though not all settled.

X-ME-L1.name: Breeze
X-ME-L1.sphere: Breeze (n=39) yields meaningful confidence with mean 6.74. Activity context: 5/22 in care-giving. Music positive (10 loved, 6 liked). YouTube 8 views. AutoGluon predicts high cross-bucket (8.23) suggesting potential.
X-ME-L1.sphere_plain: Breeze improved mood with steady energy support.

X-ME-L2.name: Sunrise
X-ME-L2.sphere: Sunrise (n=25) lifts mean to 6.76. Music reception strongest (7 loved, 7 liked). Qualitative settles: 4/15 at 20-minutes. YouTube 8 views. Cross-bucket routing suggests general mood applicability.
X-ME-L2.sphere_plain: Sunrise provided significant mood and energy shifts.

X-ME-L3.name: Updraft
X-ME-L3.sphere: Updraft (n=18) has developing confidence with mean 6.28 (std 1.74). Settle pattern: 8 at 5-minutes vs 6 at 10-minutes. Rhythm balanced (9/18). YouTube absent. Model prediction 7.88 significantly exceeds observed.
X-ME-L3.sphere_plain: Updraft had modest effects on mood for early listeners.

X-MD-L1.name: Footpath
X-MD-L1.sphere: Footpath (n=22) shows meaningful confidence with mean 6.36. Qualitative reports polarized (6 moderate improvement, 5 slight). Rhythm balanced (7/17). YouTube minimal (5 views). AutoGluon motivation prediction 7.88 suggests redesign potential.
X-MD-L1.sphere_plain: Footpath provided moderate motivation with balanced rhythm.

X-MD-L2.name: Trail
X-MD-L2.sphere: Trail (n=14) has developing confidence with mean 6.21. Notable: 5/21 show 20-minute settle time. Music positive (9 loved). YouTube 7 views but retention unknown. Model predictions (7.88) exceed observed by 1.67 points.
X-MD-L2.sphere_plain: Trail showed mild motivation support, especially over time.

X-MD-L3.name: Switchback
X-MD-L3.sphere: Switchback (n=13) shows developing confidence with mean 7.15 despite embedding drift (0.507). Qualitative: 8/17 moderate improvement with balanced rhythm. YouTube 7 views. High std 2.38 suggests dispersion in response.
X-MD-L3.sphere_plain: Switchback gave noticeable motivation, especially for active tasks.

X-MC-L1.name: Cavern
X-MC-L1.sphere: Cavern (n=24) shows meaningful confidence with mean 6.75. Music reception positive (9 loved, 9 liked). YouTube reach 8 views. AutoGluon mind-clarity prediction 7.54 exceeds observed by 0.79 points, suggesting underperformance.
X-MC-L1.sphere_plain: Cavern supported mind clarity, especially when music was appreciated.

X-MC-L2.name: Starlight
X-MC-L2.sphere: Starlight (n=16) achieves developing confidence with mean 6.81. Music highest-rated in TRANSFORMING (6 loved, 6 liked). Bimodal settle: 6/20 immediate vs 6/20 at ten-minutes. YouTube 12 views - highest in series. Predicted 7.54 indicates potential.
X-MC-L2.sphere_plain: Starlight improved clarity for many with calming music.

X-MC-L3.name: Cosmos
X-MC-L3.sphere: Cosmos (n=10) shows panel-divided interpretation: gpt-oss-120b flags bimodal while Llama-3.3 notes outlier status. Mean 5.70 (std 2.45) with mixed qualitative reports. YouTube 8 views. Clear protocol outlier requiring investigation.
X-MC-L3.sphere_plain: Cosmos had mixed effects on clarity for early listeners.

sphere_commentary.overview:
The dataset provides meaningful signals across all three series, with HEALING showing the highest average outcome.
• HEALING (n=574) leads in listener consistency with lowest variance (std 1.77)
• THRIVING (n=245) matches HEALING mean but shows higher peaks in Focus & Clarity
• TRANSFORMING (n=181) exhibits widest spread (std 1.87) consistent with ascending-arc design
sphere_commentary.cross_series:
Series exhibit distinct efficacy patterns reflecting their design intents.
• HEALING DESCENT protocols show stable performance around 7.0 mean across anxiety, over-stimulation, and sleep categories
• THRIVING HOLD protocols demonstrate rising scores with higher levels (T-FC-L3=7.63)
• TRANSFORMING ASCENT protocols show lower retention but higher predicted efficacy in AutoGluon
sphere_commentary.anomalies:
Several data points stand out as potential outliers or research questions.
• X-MC-L3 (n=10) shows bimodal distribution [0,0,1,1,2,1,0,3,0,2,0] with unusually low mean 5.70 (std 2.45)
• H-AX-L1 (n=67) shows strong efficacy but only 7 YouTube views (classic undiscovered signal)
• X-MD-L2 and X-ME-L3 have 2-3× predicted vs observed score deltas requiring investigation
sphere_commentary.development_signals:
Targeted tweaks could improve under-performing protocols.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] X-MC-L3 (n=10) – redesign descent arc or test L2 variant due to low mean 5.7 and high variance
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] H-AX-L1 (n=67) – boost YouTube promotion despite strong outcomes (7 views only)
• T-FC-L3 (n=35) – adjust hold phase or rhythmic pacing given observed mean 7.63 vs AutoGluon 7.73 prediction
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] H-SL-L2 (n=45) – investigate rhythm complexity given mixed 'too busy' opinions
sphere_commentary.embedding_analysis:
Embedding drift and clustering reveal evolving analytic frames.
• CROSS-RUN DRIFT: 22 protocols show notable drift (similarity <0.85), highest in X-MD-L3 (0.507) and H-SL-L1 (0.530)
• CROSS-PROTOCOL CLUSTERS: High similarity pairs include T-FC-L1 ↔ T-FC-L2 (0.878) suggesting redundancy
• Analytically distinct: H-OS-L3 (mean_sim 0.677) and T-FC-L3 (0.692) merit separate investigation
• Drift pattern warrants monitoring but current volume provides meaningful signal
